name: openai-api-convert
description: OpenAI Responses API to Chat Completions bridge

scripts.dev: tsx watch --include src/**/*.ts src/index.ts start --config config.dev.yaml
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/scripts/release-smoke.js config.test.yaml
scripts.test:codex-mixed-tools: npm run build && node --test --test-name-pattern='Codex mixed-tools' dist/test/bridge.test.js
